description: KubernetesUpgrade is the Schema for the kubernetesupgrades API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: KubernetesUpgradeSpec defines the desired state of KubernetesUpgrade

healthChecks.description: HealthChecks defines a list of CEL-based health checks to perform before the upgrade

items.description: HealthCheck defines a CEL-based health check

apiVersion.description: APIVersion of the resource to check

description.description: Description of what this check validates (for status/logging)

expr.description:
CEL expression that must evaluate to true for the check to pass
The resource object is available as 'object' and status as 'status'

kind.description: Kind of the resource to check

name.description: Name of the specific resource (optional, if empty checks all resources of this kind)

namespace.description: Namespace of the resource (optional, for namespaced resources)

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes defines the target Kubernetes configuration

version.description: Version is the target Kubernetes version to upgrade to (e.g., "v1.34.0")

maintenance.description: Maintenance configuration behavior for upgrade operations

duration.description: How long the window stays open (e.g., "4h", "2h30m")

start.description: Cron expression (5-field): minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

talosctl.description: Talosctl specifies the talosctl configuration for upgrade operations

image.description: Image specifies the talosctl container image

pullPolicy.description: PullPolicy describes a policy for if/when to pull a container image

repository.description: Repository is the talosctl container image repository

tag.description:
Tag is the talosctl container image tag
If not specified, defaults to the target version

status.description: KubernetesUpgradeStatus defines the observed state of KubernetesUpgrade

completedAt.description: CompletedAt is the time the upgrade reached a terminal phase

controllerNode.description: ControllerNode is the controller node being used for the upgrade

currentVersion.description: CurrentVersion is the current Kubernetes version detected in the cluster

history.description: History records past version transitions on this CR, newest first

items.description: UpgradeHistoryEntry records a single completed version transition

completedAt.description: CompletedAt is when the run reached its terminal phase

fromVersion.description: FromVersion is the cluster version detected at the start of the run

lastError.description: LastError is the final error message when Phase is Failed

phase.description: Phase is the terminal phase reached (Completed or Failed)

retries.description: Retries is the number of retries recorded during the run

startedAt.description: StartedAt is when the run began

toVersion.description: ToVersion is the spec-target version at the time of completion

jobName.description: JobName is the name of the job handling the upgrade

lastError.description: LastError contains the last error message

lastUpdated.description: LastUpdated timestamp of last status update

message.description: Message provides details about the current state

nextMaintenanceWindow.description: NextMaintenanceWindow reflect the next time a maintenance can happen

observedGeneration.description: ObservedGeneration reflects the generation of the most recently observed spec

phase.description: Phase represents the current phase of the upgrade

retries.description: Retries is the number of times the upgrade was attempted

startedAt.description: StartedAt is the time the current upgrade attempt began

targetVersion.description: TargetVersion is the target version from the spec
